era: Indie Rock. E=6 -- urgent, post-punk-influenced, dynamic, gender-balanced. Return from degree 115. Matador. v1.49.358.

theory_nodes.concept: Female power in post-punk -- commanding vocals, not ethereal. Siouxsie/Poly Styrene/Sleater-Kinney lineage. Voice as engine.
theory_nodes.description: Female power in post-punk. Commanding vocals.

theory_nodes.concept: Rhythm-forward composition -- drums and bass drive songs. Post-punk gift: rhythm as engine. Angular guitar spare.
theory_nodes.description: Rhythm-forward. Post-punk gift to indie rock.

cross_references.relationship: E=7 to E=6. Post-hardcore to post-punk urgency.
E=6 to E=8. The energy leap to absolute maximum.
